languages.text: "Незамедлительно организовать церемонию и вернуть Торговый Патент на надлежащее ему место".
"Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."
languages.original_text: "Незамедлительно организовать церемонию и вернуть Торговый Патент на надлежащее ему место".

traits.locale_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

languages.text: 「儀式の準備を済ませ、貿易証書を元の場所に返してくれ」
languages.original_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

traits.locale_text: 「儀式の準備を済ませ、貿易証書を元の場所に返してください。」

languages.text: «Organicen la ceremonia y devuelvan la Patente de Comercio a su legítimo lugar».
languages.original_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

traits.locale_text: «Organicen la ceremonia y devuelvan la Patente de Comercio a su legítimo lugar».

languages.text: "Trefft alle Vorbereitungen für die Zeremonie und bringt den Handelsbrief zurück an seinen angestammten Platz."
languages.original_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

traits.locale_text: "Trefft alle Vorbereitungen für die Zeremonie und bringt den Handelsbrief zurück an seinen angestammten Platz."

languages.text: « Préparez la cérémonie qui accompagnera le retour de la lettre de marque dans la salle sacrée. »
languages.original_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

traits.locale_text: « Préparez la cérémonie qui accompagnera le retour de la lettre de marque dans la salle sacrée. »

languages.text: “着手安排仪式，将贸易授状归回原位。”
languages.original_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

traits.locale_text: “着手安排仪式，将贸易授状归回原位。”

languages.text: "Tören için hazırlıkları yapın ve Ticari Ruhsatname'yi ait olduğu yere geri koyun."
languages.original_text: "Make arrangements for the ceremony and return the Warrant of Trade to its proper place."

traits.locale_text: "Tören için hazırlıkları yapın ve Ticari Ruhsatname'yi ait olduğu yere geri koyun."
